steps.title: Calculate total books
steps.content: There are n mystery books and 18 biography books, so the total number of books is the sum: $$n + 18$$.

steps.title: Compute probability of mystery
steps.content:
Probability equals (number of mystery books) divided by (total books). Substitute the values: $$\frac{n}{n+18}$$.
That matches Choice B — $\frac{n}{n + 18}$.
